nasb.text: And suddenly there appeared with the angel a multitude of the heavenly host praising God and saying,

esv.text: And suddenly there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly host praising God and saying,

cnv.text: 忽然有一大隊天兵，同那天使一起讚美　神說：

ccb.text: 忽然，有一大队天军出现，与那天使一同赞美上帝说：

csbs.text: 忽然有一大队天军出现，与那位天使一起赞美神，说：
